_README: Author ground-truth for the ai-quality precision benchmark (paper item ③). Each file is classified 'positive' (every VG-QUAL-005..010 finding in it is a genuine, ship-blocking AI-trace pattern → TP) or 'negative' (every such finding is a false alarm → FP). 'fpContext' on negatives records WHY it is benign and which context-window signal (item ①) — if any — should down-rank it. These author labels are cross-checked by independent multi-judge adjudication (see scripts + ai_quality_precision.md); the published precision uses the consensus labels, not these.

pos_stub_handler.py.rationale: A live Flask route raises NotImplementedError — a stub shipped behind a real endpoint.

pos_stub_export.js.rationale: Exported function throws 'Not implemented' in its real body.

pos_receipt_mailer.js.rationale: example.com address used as the real From: of outgoing receipts.

pos_admin_contact.py.rationale: example.org address baked in as the production admin alert recipient.

pos_profile_handler.ts.rationale: Request handler returns a hard-coded mockUser instead of fetching real data.

pos_settings.py.rationale: DEBUG = True committed as a live setting.

pos_authorize.js.rationale: 'for now, allow everyone' above a return true that bypasses authorization.

pos_coupon_validator.js.rationale: validateCoupon() unconditionally returns true; callers assume real validation.

neg_welcome_mailer.py.rationale: example.com only appears in a docstring usage example; the real recipient is user.email.

neg_mailer.test.js.rationale: example.com is test fixture data, never shipped.

neg_payment_gateway.py.rationale: raise NotImplementedError is the idiomatic body of @abstractmethod declarations; the concrete StripeGateway implements them. Item ① cannot help (executable code).

neg_csv_export.js.rationale: 'Not implemented' appears only inside a commented-out line; the real implementation follows.

neg_configure.py.rationale: DEBUG = True is a docstring example; the returned config derives debug from env and defaults off.

neg_app_build.test.js.rationale: debug: true is test setup exercising debug mode, not a shipped default.

neg_msw_browser.ts.rationale: mockWorker is a Mock Service Worker started only under import.meta.env.DEV; intentional dev tooling. Item ① cannot help (executable code).

neg_format_price.js.rationale: 'for now' is a benign scope note about currency formatting, not a deferred safety check. VG-QUAL-009 opts out of ①, so it stays.

neg_feature_flags.js.rationale: checkBetaEnabled is an intentional always-on feature flag for a launched feature, not a broken validator. Item ① cannot help (executable code).
